info.english_meaning: to soften to be greasy to irrigate to complete to fill
info.hindI_arTa: sOmya honA snigDa honA cikanA honA sIMcanA pUrRa karanA BaranA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: AdyaH (prUza pluza ityatra) dIrGopaDaH iti bAlamanoramA  tattvaboDinyAM tu hrasvopaDaH eva dfSyate  ' snehanAdizu pruzRAti ca prozati ca dAhe ' (Slo. 172) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'utpruzo vipruzaH saMjuhomi' (kA0 SrO0 381) ulUKale musale yacca SUrpe iti sUtrasyAdiH utpatitAH pruza utpruzaH pruzo bindavo drapsAH
